```prompt
---
agent: agent
description: "Implement model evaluation with proper metrics"
---
# Model Evaluation
## Task
Evaluate ML model performance with appropriate metrics.
## Requirements
1. Select metrics matching task (accuracy, F1, AUC, RMSE, BLEU). 2. Implement k-fold cross-validation.
3. Create confusion matrix and classification report. 4. Plot ROC/PR curves for binary classification.
5. Compare against baseline models.
## Constraints
- Use stratified splits for imbalanced data. Report confidence intervals. Don't overfit to test set.
## Success Criteria
- Appropriate metrics computed. Cross-validated. Compared to baseline. Confidence intervals reported.
```
